name: J1939MakeDTC
title: J1939MakeDTC
syntax: long J1939MakeDTC(dword spn, byte fmi, byte oc, dword &dtcValue)
description: Function generates a DTC from the defined SPN, FMI and OC.

parameters.name: spn
parameters.description: Suspect Parameter Number of the specified DTC. Valid value range: 0x0 – 0x7FFFF.

parameters.name: fmi
parameters.description: Failure Mode Identifier of the specified DTC. Valid value range: 0x0 – 0x1F.

parameters.name: oc
parameters.description: Occurrence Counter of the specified DTC . Valid value range: 0x0 – 0x7F.

parameters.name: dtcValue
parameters.description: The value of the generated DTC block.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
